Hero.title: A Warm Home for <italic>Every Paw</italic>
Hero.description: Welcome to PawsHome, where every wagging tail finds its happy ever after. Join our community of pet lovers dedicated to rescue, care, and adoption.

Home.noticeBoardDesc: Recent lost and found posts from our members.
Home.meetResidentsDesc: These beautiful souls are looking for a forever home. Each one has been health-checked and is ready to join your family.
Home.blogCornerDesc: Learn about pet care, nutrition, and read heartwarming stories of adoption from our community members.

Footer.desc: Providing a warm and trustworthy community for pet lovers, adopters, and owners since 2024.
Footer.newsletterDesc: Stay updated with our latest furry friends and stories.
Footer.copyright: © 2024 PawsHome. All rights reserved. Your trusted pet shelter companion.

Auth.loginDesc: Sign in to your account to continue
Auth.loginError: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
Auth.registerSuccess: Account created successfully! You can now login.
Auth.loginWithGoogleRequired: This account was registered with Google. Please login with Google.
Auth.accountBanned: Your account has been banned. Please contact the administrator.

Admin.description: Welcome to the PawsHome Management System. Please select a module from the sidebar or use the quick links below to get started.

UserManagement.title: User Management
UserManagement.manageUsersDesc: Manage and monitor all platform members.
UserManagement.createMemberDesc: Add a new member to the PawsHome community.
UserManagement.searchUsers: Search users by name or email...
UserManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
UserManagement.banConfirm: Are you sure you want to ban this user?
UserManagement.unbanConfirm: Are you sure you want to unban this user?
UserManagement.noUsersFound: No users found matching your search.
UserManagement.userNotFoundDesc: The user you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.

RoleManagement.title: Role Management
RoleManagement.manageRolesDesc: Manage system roles and their associated permissions.
RoleManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?

PermissionManagement.title: Permission Management
PermissionManagement.managePermissionsDesc: Manage fine-grained actions and access control strings.
PermissionManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this permission?

BreedManagement.title: Breed Management
BreedManagement.manageBreedsDesc: Manage pet breeds within the system.
BreedManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this breed?

SpeciesManagement.title: Species Management
SpeciesManagement.manageSpeciesDesc: Manage primary species groups (Dogs, Cats, etc.)
SpeciesManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this species?

PetManagement.title: Pet Management
PetManagement.managePetsDesc: Manage profiles, health records, and adoption status of pets.
PetManagement.searchPets: Search by name or pet code...
PetManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this pet profile?

AdoptionManagement.title: Adoption Requests
AdoptionManagement.manageAdoptionsDesc: Review and manage adoption requests from the community.
AdoptionManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this adoption request?
AdoptionManagement.rejectWarning: You are about to reject this request
AdoptionManagement.rejectionNotePlaceholder: Explain why the request was rejected (this will be seen by the applicant)...
AdoptionManagement.approvalMessagePlaceholder: Send a warm message to the new pet owner...
AdoptionManagement.defaultApprovalMessage: Congratulations! Your adoption request has been approved. We will contact you soon for the next steps.

BlogManagement.title: Blog Management
BlogManagement.manageBlogDesc: Create and manage pet care articles, news, and guides.
BlogManagement.author: Author
BlogManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?

CommunityManagement.title: Community Posts Management
CommunityManagement.managePostsDesc: Manage and monitor lost and found pet posts from the community.
CommunityManagement.author: Author
CommunityManagement.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this post?
CommunityManagement.searchPosts: Search by title, author, or location...

CommunityBoard.title: Community Notice Board
CommunityBoard.subtitle: Connecting pet lovers to share notices, track lost companions, and support animal welfare.
CommunityBoard.createSubtitle: Please provide as much detail as possible so the community can help you quickly.
CommunityBoard.postTitlePlaceholder: e.g., Lost yellow cat in Cau Giay area...
CommunityBoard.locationPlaceholder: e.g., Dich Vong Ward, Cau Giay District, Hanoi
CommunityBoard.contactPlaceholder: Your phone number or Facebook profile link
CommunityBoard.uploadImagesDesc: Select up to 5 clear images of the pet.
CommunityBoard.successCreate: Post created successfully! Your post will be displayed immediately.
CommunityBoard.errorCreate: An error occurred while creating the post. Please try again later.
CommunityBoard.noComments: No comments yet. Be the first to start the discussion!
CommunityBoard.author: Author
CommunityBoard.imageLimitError: You can only upload up to 5 images.
CommunityBoard.createPostWarning: * Please only post notices related to finding pets. Any posts for other purposes will be removed.
CommunityBoard.postingTip1: Use clear images showing the pet's face and identifying features.
CommunityBoard.postingTip2: Provide detailed descriptions of personality, collar color, or scars (if any).
CommunityBoard.postingTip3: Specify the last seen time and location.
CommunityBoard.postingTip4: Leave the most accurate contact information.
CommunityBoard.descriptionPlaceholder: Detailed description of the pet (features, lost/found circumstances...)

PetList.title: Find Your New Best Friend
PetList.subtitle: Hundreds of lovable pets are waiting for a forever home. Filter to find the perfect companion for your family.
PetList.noPetsFound: No pets found matching your criteria.
PetList.noPetsFoundDesc: We couldn't find any furry friends matching those exact criteria. Try adjusting your filters or clearing them to see more residents.

PetDetail.adoptionProcessDesc: We will review your request and get back to you within 2-3 business days.
PetDetail.noDescription: No description available yet for this adorable pet.
PetDetail.noNotes: No additional notes available for this pet.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: We are always here to listen and support you and the pets.
Contact.donationSubtitle: Every contribution helps improve the lives of the residents at our shelter.
Contact.followUs: Follow us to get the latest updates on our pets.
Contact.donationDescription: Every contribution you make helps PawsHome maintain rescue activities, provide food, medical care, and find new homes for abandoned dogs and cats. Your support brings a better life to our four-legged friends.

Adoption.title: Adoption Process
Adoption.subtitle: The journey to finding a new home for our residents in 4 simple steps.
Adoption.step1Desc: Browse our profiles and find a pet that matches your lifestyle.
Adoption.step2Desc: Fill out the adoption application form so we can learn more about you.
Adoption.step3Desc: Have a chat with our volunteers and ensure a safe environment for the pet.
Adoption.step4Desc: Complete the paperwork and start your happy journey with your new family member.
Adoption.req1: Commitment to love and care for the pet for its entire life.
Adoption.req2: Provide a safe and stable living environment.
Adoption.req3: Financial ability to provide proper nutrition and medical care.

AdoptionForm.title: Adoption Application
AdoptionForm.subtitle: Thank you for your interest in giving a new home to one of our residents.
AdoptionForm.reasonLabel: Why do you want to adopt this specific pet?
AdoptionForm.experienceLabel: Have you owned pets before? Please share your experience.
AdoptionForm.hasOtherPetsLabel: Do you currently have any other pets at home?
AdoptionForm.otherPetsDetailLabel: If yes, please tell us more about them.
AdoptionForm.hasYardLabel: Does your home have a yard or outdoor play space?
AdoptionForm.agreement: I commit to love, care for, and take full responsibility for this pet's life.
AdoptionForm.success: Application submitted successfully! We will get back to you soon.
AdoptionForm.error: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again later.
AdoptionForm.quote: "By submitting this application, you are taking the first step towards a lifelong friendship."

Blog.title: Educational Corner & Pet Stories
Blog.subtitle: Learn about pet care, nutrition, and read heartwarming stories from our community.
Blog.noPostsDesc: We couldn't find any articles matching your search. Try changing your keywords or filters.
Blog.author: Author
Blog.newsletterDesc: Subscribe to our newsletter to receive the latest pet care tips and heart-warming adoption stories.

Search.title: Unified Search
Search.subtitle: Search for pets or articles using text or images with AI power.
Search.uploadPrompt: Drag & drop image here or click to browse
Search.uploadHint: AI will analyze the image to find the best matching results
Search.noResultsDesc: Try changing your keywords or use a clearer image.

Donate.title: Support & Donate
Donate.subtitle: Your contribution directly provides shelter, food, and medical care for our rescue pets.
Donate.formSubtitle: Enter your donation amount and details to generate a payment QR code.
Donate.isAnonymousLabel: Donate anonymously (Name will be hidden on the board)
Donate.successDesc: Your donation has been verified successfully. PawsHome and the pets send our deepest gratitude for your support!
Donate.cancelDesc: The payment process has been cancelled. Every bit of support matters, and you can try again whenever you are ready.
Donate.securityNotice: The payment gateway is securely protected by PayOS & VietQR
